title: myosotis palustris var. scorpioides
intro: Myosotis palustris var. scorpioides, also known as creeping forget-me-not, is a perennial flowering plant that belongs to the borage family and is native to Europe and Asia. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of M. palustris var. scorpioides include its ability to aid in the treatment of skin conditions such as eczema and acne, as well as its potential to reduce fever and alleviate respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to harness its medicinal properties.
